_README: Airport database for travel-scout: nearest-airport-to-a-map-click, distance-based fare/ground estimation, and automatic gateway discovery. hub = connectivity/size tier: 1 = major international hub (cheap, frequent), 2 = medium, 3 = small/regional/resort (few flights, pricey). Coordinates are approximate airport locations (deg). Curated rows (hand-tuned hub tiers, verified names) act as overrides on top of a floor imported from OurAirports (github.com/davidmegginson/ourairports-data, public domain) covering every airport worldwide with an IATA code and either large/medium field status or scheduled service. Re-run scripts/build_airports.py to refresh the floor; curated entries always win on iata collision.
